purpose: AI-native email client that replaces Gmail, Outlook, Superhuman, Grammarly, Dragon, Front, and Otter.ai — all in one $9/mo subscription

pricing.personal: $9/mo — 3 accounts, full AI, unlimited search, E2EE, snooze, schedule send
pricing.pro: $19/mo — unlimited accounts, priority AI (Sonnet), team features, API access
pricing.team: $12/user/mo — shared inboxes, admin console, audit logs, SSO
pricing.enterprise: Custom — on-prem, compliance, dedicated support, SLA, Opus AI

stack.database: PostgreSQL (Neon serverless) + Upstash Redis + Meilisearch + ClickHouse

models.haiku: claude-haiku-4-5 — real-time triage, grammar, quick replies
models.opus: claude-opus-4-7 — deep analysis, voice profile, Enterprise tier

ai_layer.local_inference: WebGPU / Transformers.js — runs on user GPU at $0/token

compute_tiers.cloud: Modal H100 — full power, voice profile training

industry_firsts: WebGPU client-side AI inference in the browser (Llama 3.1 8B, 41 tok/sec, $0/token)
CRDT real-time collaborative email drafting (live cursors via Yjs + WebSocket)
AI inbox agent that works overnight — drafts replies, you approve in morning
Voice cloning for AI replies — drafts sound exactly like you
Email-as-database — query your inbox with natural language or SQL

infrastructure.mta: Full custom MTA — SMTP, relay, bounce processing, DKIM/SPF/DMARC, IP warmup, deliverability monitoring

integrates_with_via_api_only.crontech: Hosted on Crontech bare metal — replaces Cloudflare/Fly.io dependency
integrates_with_via_api_only.gatetest: POST /api/gate/result — gates every PR before deploy
integrates_with_via_api_only.gluecron: Repo hosted on Gluecron — push triggers Crontech deploy

learns_from: which AI compose suggestions are sent vs discarded
which reply suggestions are accepted vs ignored
voice profile refinement from every sent email
triage accuracy confirmed by user actions (archive, reply, snooze)
phishing detection confirmed by user reports
ai_flywheel.competitive_moat: Every email sent through AlecRae makes the next suggestion smarter. Superhuman has no learning loop. Gmail's AI is generic. AlecRae learns YOU.

status: Code complete. Needs infra accounts (Neon, Upstash, Stripe, Anthropic key, Google/Microsoft OAuth, DNS). Migration path: move from Cloudflare/Fly.io to Crontech.
competitive_position: $9/mo replaces $100+/mo of tools. WebGPU AI runs at $0/token in the browser — no competitor has this. CRDT collaborative drafting is an industry first in email. Full MTA owned, no Mailgun dependency. The flywheel: every email makes the AI smarter.
